What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A clear rectangular glass baking dish sits on a dark speckled granite countertop containing a red can of Hormel Chili with a yellow lid. A blue box of Great Value Cream Cheese is placed next to the chili can inside the dish. A clear plastic container filled with shredded yellow cheese is positioned to the left of the baking dish.

canonical_answer: At 0s, ingredients including chili and cream cheese are displayed on the counter; at 14s, a hand sprays the inside of the glass baking dish; at 16s, a block of cream cheese is placed into the dish on a red trivet; at 18s, a block of butter sits inside the glass dish on the countertop.
